feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Process Automation
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Process Automation Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP iRPA Outlook Email Search Criterion - how to add OR Condition
entry.content:
Hi

Is there a way to add multiple Email Search Criterias but with OR condition? Currently, if you mention 2-3 search conditions, by default it takes them as AND conditions and the search happens accordingly. 

I need to add multiple search critera, but using OR condition. Does it allow such functionality? 

Thanks

Sandip

entry.title: How to export DOX templates from SAP RPA to SAP BUILD
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am moving to SAP BUILD after 2,5 years of using SAP RPA and as I perfectly managed to import my projects, I am facing some difficulties with those using DOX templates.

As far as I understood, SAP RPA and SAP BUILD cannot coexist in the same subaccount in BTP cockpit, so I installed SAP BUILD in another subaccount. What should I do to have my DOX templates available in my imported projects? Should I set up DOX in a certain way in the new subaccount, using the same service key maybe? Export/import them manually? Please note that I cannot export any of my templates on DOX UI, each attempt resulting in a pop up saying:

Thanks beforehand for your help.

BR,

LM.

entry.title: Send email through Sharedmail box Outlook
entry.content:
Hi Team,

There is a requirement to use shared mailboxes to send emails.These mailboxes has two entry point-Primary and secondary address.
Is it possible to use secondary email address to send emails using Outlook?
I have added the account to outlook using secondary email address however send email fails with error "account not found in outlook session"

entry.title: Could not upload the document for information extraction: The templates(s) used for detection are de
entry.content:
I am getting an error message on Extract Data(template) task when I am running the automation in quality tenant. "Could not upload the document for information extraction: The templates(s) used for detection are deactivated"

When I run the automation in Development tenant, automation runs without any errors.

Also, I can confirm that all the templates in QE1 tenant are active. 

However, whenever I click on any one of the templates then I am getting below error: 

  • "SAP_IPA_28003: The requested template could not be found in the Document Extraction Service. It might have been deleted." 

Kindly help.

entry.title: SAP Process Automation - Unattended mode after restart
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I would need your help with unattended mode in SBPA.

After each installation of security patches on a dedicated station running the SBPA Desktop Agent in unattended mode, we must log in to the tenant. I've looked through the available materials, but I can't find a way to bypass authentication or use saved login data. If any of you know a working procedure, please respond. The instructions show something, but I actually couldn't get it to work. If you haven't tried it, please do not write your opinion.

Thank you very much & kindest regards, JV

SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: SAP Process Automation - Opening PDF file unhandled exception in case of BadStreamError
entry.content:
Dear SBPA DecOps Team,

Could anyone have a look to the following case?

In case we try to process corrupted PDF file, unhandled exception causes the automation stops and it is impossible to use Try..Catch to manage it. The detailed error message follows, however we use Cloud Studio and latest PDF SDK. Any suggestion?

Thank you very much, JV

SAP Build Process Automation 

 

An asynchronous activity in a custom script may have failed. Add an await operator before each SDK activity call. Error: This error originated either by throwing inside of an async function without a catch block, or by rejecting a promise which was not handled with .catch(). The promise rejected with the reason "FormatError: Bad encoding in flate stream".
  • An asynchronous activity in a custom script may have failed. Add an await operator before each SDK activity call. Error: This error originated either by throwing inside of an async function without a catch block, or by rejecting a promise which was not handled with .catch(). The promise rejected with the reason "FormatError: Bad encoding in flate stream".
 
Date: 5/24/2024, 05:37:46 PM

entry.title: Capturing the approval form status on SAP BPA (Build Process Automation)
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have a question about SAP Build Process Automation (BPA). If I create an approval form with options to approve or reject, can I capture the approval status and integrate it with SAP Build Apps?

Specifically, I want to display statuses such as 'Approved', 'Rejected', and 'Pending' in SAP Build Apps using the form. 'Approved' if the user clicks approve, 'Rejected' if the user clicks reject, and 'Pending' if the user hasn't clicked approve or reject yet.

I only acknowledged about taking the status of a whole process and what I want it the status inside the process which is the approval form.

My guess is that we can retrieve the status by create an action. If so, how the configuration will be? Or are there any existing functionalities within SAP BPA for capturing and retrieving approval form status, like using output of the form?

Best regards,
Isyraf

entry.title: SAP IAS user creation under group using Identity Directory API
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to create an external user using the IAS IDP, To achieve this I am using the standard IAS Directory API. External user is getting created but the group is not assigned. I am mapping group parameters under the corporate group schema values, even then it is just creating a user but not assigning the group.

Below are the steps I am following to create user Id :

  1. login to SAP business accelerator hub.
  2. search for Identity directory API.
  3. select the Post action under the User section, that will allow you create the external user.
  4. configure your environment variable
  5. map the input parameters at post action level including the corporate group values.
  6. click on try out , it will create the user at subaccount level but group is not assigned.

Could you please help or suggest me any blog to resolve this issue.

Thanks & Regards,

Rupesh

entry.title: SAP Build - Desktop Agent - Unattended bot - logs
entry.content:
Hello,

We have an unattended bot on virtual machine and after a few months of productive usage we are facing a problem that Desktop agent is saving a huge amount of logs which leads to a no free space on a disk.

Those logs are not removed after the restart of the machine even that their type is TMP.

Is there some setting that can be done to not save them or delete them after some time? There are files older than 2 months. Please see attached picture.

Thank you very much.

Patrik

entry.title: Problem with SAP Build Process Automation(Trial instance)
entry.content:
Hi community,

Since last 2-3 days, SAP build Process Automation trial tenant is not working. The same process(with Action calls) was working before and now it is throwing some random errors.

Moreover since yesterday, I am not able to deploy SBPA related any content(process, actions).. it always timed out. 

Tried creating a new trial, switching machines, clearing cache, different browsers but still the same since yesterday.

 

Please help @Archana 

 

Regards,

Aman

entry.title: Deployment Error In SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hey all,

We have been working in SAP Build Process Automation for past few Days. 
Suddenly today we are facing deployment issue while deploying the workflow and I also tried to Redeploying the workflow which were working fine and still facing same error in deployment stating this.

Deployment request timeout
Correlation ID: 1516c989-9203-4006-95c6-95abc7697ec6

Attaching the Screenshot
 

 

I have also tried using different BTP Accounts but still facing same error .
Could anyone Suggest what are we doing wrong or may be it's an problem from SAP.

Many Thanks in Advance.
SAP Workflow Management, process visibility capability 
SAP Build Process Automation 

SAP BTP, ABAP environment 

SAP Workflow Management

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation- Right way to process a JSON array
entry.content:
I have a payload where I am getting of list of regions with a list of approvers for each region. For example - 

regions": [  "region": "USA","regionapprovers": [ { "approver": "djohnson@xyz.io" }, { "approver": "adavis@xyz.io" } ]]

Now I would like to process the above JSON Array into BPA and send an approval email for each region to get approval from at least one approver. 

What is the right way to implement this?

Thanks for the help!

entry.title: SAP build Process Automation is not capturing SAP GUI window completely
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are trying to capture SAP GUI screen through build process automation, but it is not loading complete screen.

Please suggest how we can capture screen completely.

entry.title: SAP Desktop agent control tower is not working.
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

 

I am unable to do registration of new Agent. The screen is stucked after clicking 'Agents'. Please see the attached screenshots. Please suggest what to do to fix this.

entry.title: Process Automation Desktop Agent for MAC
entry.content:
Hello guys,

I'm trying to activate the tenant in my Desktop Agent for MAC but I'm facing an error when i login in to activate my tenant:

{
  "error": {
    "status": 403,
    "code": "SAP_IPA_05120",
    "severity": "error",
    "message": "Fail to create a registration token",
    "correlationId": "ce22161e-1183-404c-7b40-327453839ac7"
  }
}

I found the KBA Note 3401479, that fix this error, but it is only for windows. 

https://me.sap.com/notes/3401479/E

Some of you guys already had this same problems and can help me, please?
 SAP Intelligent Robotic Process Automation

entry.title: Error while creating a decisions in Build Process Automation - Again?
entry.content:
I'm trying to add a decision object to a SAP Build Process Automation project. After creating and configuring the decision I close the decision configuration screen and can see that the decision object found in the overview of objects in the project is stored with a almost transparent font.

 The decision object disappears (automatically deleted) in the overview of objects on the project.

I have raised similar question previously (Solved: Error while creating a decision - SAP Community) and the issue was solved. But it seems like the issue with decision creations in Build Process Automation occurs again. 

Has anyone done the same observations?

entry.title: Send files along with SAP Build Process Automation API Trigger
entry.content:
Hi All,

I just want to know is there a way to send PDF/Excel files along with the SAP Build Process Automation API Trigger ? So that I can extract the information from that file and do rest of the processing. Please point out to some blogs or documentations

Thank You

entry.title: 2nd Problem calling on Excel Data with Process Automation
entry.content: Something seems to have changed, and I can no longer link excel worksheets to my automation. The screenshot "current member fail.jpg" should allow me to select a value that looks like that in "value should be.jpg".

entry.title: Stuck in userlane tutorial. Can I skip the step?
entry.content:
Hi, I am trying to get into SAP Build for some projects in my team. I am currently stuck on a basic tutorial for invoice approval. I followed the userlane guide until there was one step where I was not able to execute what was required. Think this is an error in the tutorial, but now I am stuck there and can't skip. Anyone had the same problem or ideas on how to continue?
(Concretely the error is in: Chapter 1 - SAP Build Process Automation with Vertical Process Editor; Lesson 2 - Build Automation to Extract Invoice Details; Step 1: Click the "Cog" icon <-- I clicked the Cog I con but the next step does not show)

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation - Unable to register Microsoft 365 external authentication
entry.content:
Hello all,

I have a requirement to read an excel sheet hosted on sharepoint and so I have configured an external authentication profile in SAP Build process automation portal. I have also completed its pre-requisite of creating Microsoft entra ID (Azure AD) application using Configure Azure Application | SAP Help Portal which generated clientID and client secret where in I have applied all the necessary permissions. The same along with tenant ID was used while configuring the external authentication profile.

I have an IRPA agent installed in my local machine and it is able to display the same profile. I entered my email address associated with Microsoft 365 and hit the register button, it opened a new page where in I logged in successfully. Post login, it redirected me to a page having URL https://login.microsoftonline.com/common/oauth2/nativeclient?code=xxyzz becuase the same URL was specified in the Configure Azure application link above, this URL displays a blank page and nothing happens afterwards.

I believe instead of https://login.microsoftonline.com/common/oauth2/nativeclient, it should redirect to some build process automation page where it should receive the ?code=xxyyzz to complete the authentication cycle.

Has anyone faced this issue? Need help
